title: Chocolate Chip Cookies
steps: preheat oven to 350°
Microwave butter until melted
Beat the butter with sugars until creamy
Add vanilla + egg
Mix until incorporated
Add flour, baking soda and salt gradually until beaten
Add chocolate chips
Bake for 9-11 minutes

title: Crock Pot Garlic Parmesan Chicken Pasta
ingredients: 1 (12 oz) bottle of Parmesan Garlic Sauce
4 oz. shredded or grated parmesan cheese
steps: Place chicken in slow cooker. Pour entire bottle of Parmesan Garlic Sauce over the chicken.
Fill Parmesan Garlic Sauce bottle w/ milk and shake. Add milk and remaining sauce to slow cooker.
Add cream cheese cut into block.
Add parmesan cheese + stir to coat + combine to the chicken.
Cook on low for 3-4 hours or cook on high for 2-3 hours.
Shred chicken and return to slow cooker + mix into the sauce.
Cook pasta + pour pasta into the slow cooker. Stir to combine.

title: Raspberry Custard Pie
steps: Pre-heat oven to 375°
Prepare crust + place into 9 inch pie pans
Whisk together beaten eggs, milk + vanilla in seperate bowl, mix together sugar + flour
Add to wet ingredients + dry ingredients + whisk until smooth
Put raspberries in bottom of pie crust, then add the home made custard
Bake for 45 minutes
Let cool completely before storing in fridge

title: Creamy Pesto Chicken Pasta
steps: Brown cubed chicken in a skillet w/ butter + garlic
add uncooked pasta + chicken broth
cover + simmer until pasta is tender + most of the broth is absorbed
add pesto, cream cheese + milk
stir while heating until the cream cheese has melted into the milk + formed a sauce w/ the pesto
stir in grated parmesan until cheese is melted
add fresh spinach + sundried tomatoes. Stir until the spinach has wilted

title: Crock Pot Banana Bread
steps: using two 4"-5" strips of parchment paper, line the bowl of your crock pot in an "x" formation + spray w/ cooking spray.
in a large bowl, whisk together butter, sugar, brown sugar, eggs + vanilla. Whisk in mashed bananas.
in another large bowl, whisk together flour, baking powder, baking soda, cinnamon + salt. Fold dry ingredients into wet ingredients until combined, then fold in chocolate chips.
transfer batter to slow cooker + smooth into an even layer. Top with more chocolate chips + cook on low for 4 hours.
remove from crock pot base + let cool for 10 minutes before serving.
